This '''Gladiator''' fought in [[the Cauldron]] on [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]. He belonged to a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with three large, clawed toes on each foot. He fought [[Nilo (Rodisar)|Nilo]] before being slain by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]].

==Biography==
[[File:NiloVSGladiator.jpg|280px|left|thumb|The Gladiator fighting Nilo]]
This armored gladiator fought in [[the Cauldron]] on [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]],<ref name="CW" /> shortly after the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> It was the largest gladiatorial pit on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]], filled with violent warriors, where war barons and generals sought out the best combatants who would win their wars.<ref name="DBR">{{DB|location|rattatak|Rattatak}}</ref> Therefore, this gladiator, like many other gladiators,<ref name="CW" /> entered a deadly free-for-all battle,<ref name="EGD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> but it was a rare gladiator indeed who could survive multiple fights there.<ref name="DBR" /> In one battle, this gladiator faced [[Nilo (Rodisar)|Nilo]], however, at the same time, [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] [[Mission to Rattatak|entered]] the fray and, with the assistance of fire shells launched by the combat droid [[L8-L9]], killed most of the remaining combatants. Among them, Nilo and his opponent were slain by a fiery blast.<ref name="CW" />

==Personality==
The Gladiator belonged to a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with three large, clawed toes on each foot. This contender wore full-body armor with a face-concealing helmet and was armed with two melee weapons, one in each hand.<ref name="CW" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:GladiatorsOnTheCauldron.jpg|280px|right|thumb|The «second» gladiator who appeared after the death of the «first»]]
This gladiator first appeared as an unnamed background character in the [[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|sixth chapter]]<ref name="CW" /> of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', an animated television micro-series<ref name="Chapter Archive">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/archive.html|text=View ''Clone Wars'' Chapter Archive}}</ref> produced by [[Cartoon Network]] Studios<ref name="Volume One">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]</ref> and originally aired on [[November 14]], [[2003]].<ref name="TV">{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars/chapter-vi-276612|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars - Season 1, Episode 6: Chapter VI}}</ref> Unlike other background characters from the same chapter, who were given at least a name in later sources, this gladiator's history remained unrevealed.

In fact, in the sixth chapter an unidentified gladiator appeared to die twice: first from a shot fired by an L8-L9 droid, and later when Asajj Ventress caused a massive slab of stone to collapse. It remained unclear whether this was the same gladiator, who might have survived the droid's shot only to perish beneath the rubble, or whether two different fighters wearing similar armor were present in the arena at the time.<ref name="CW" />
